# CWE-917 safe: fixed template, parameterized data
lang: go
file: CWE-917-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-917 mitigated: template structure is fixed; user values are data fields only.

import (
	"bytes"
	"html"
	"net/http"
	"text/template"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

const reportTemplate = `{{.Title}} filtered by {{.Filter}}`

func RenderReportSafe() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		title := c.Query("title")
		filter := c.Query("filter")
		safeTitle := html.EscapeString(title)
		safeFilter := html.EscapeString(filter)
		tmpl := template.Must(template.New("report").Parse(reportTemplate))
		var buf bytes.Buffer
		data := map[string]string{"Title": safeTitle, "Filter": safeFilter}
		if err := tmpl.Execute(&buf, data); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.String(http.StatusOK, buf.String())
	}
}
